home.heroSubtitle: A living Zulu kraal – experience heritage, unity & joy
home.introText: Step into our traditional kraal. Learn beadwork with gogo, dance with warriors, hear stories around the fire, and taste authentic Zulu hospitality.

culturalTour.title: isiZulu Cultural Tours
culturalTour.desc: Experience authentic Zulu heritage through beadwork, dance, spear crafting, and traditional cooking — all in one immersive journey.

ceremonies.title: Traditional Ceremonies & Weddings
ceremonies.desc: Celebrate love and life with authentic Zulu rituals, music, and dance.

workshops.title: School Workshops & Community
workshops.desc: Interactive cultural education programs for schools and groups.

accommodation.title: Traditional isiZulu Hut Accommodation
accommodation.desc: Stay overnight in an authentic Zulu homestead and wake up to village life.

ourStory.heroSubtitle: A journey rooted in isiZulu heritage, community, and rhythm.
ourStory.myStoryP1: I may not claim to be a perfect man, but I strive to live with good morals and ethics. My name is Mzamo, and I am a proud citizen of the Ngonyamaneni area in Hluhluwe, under Chief Mdletshe.
ourStory.myStoryP2: I created my village because I love my culture and want to preserve our traditions for future generations. What began as a passion has grown into a community initiative that people appreciate and support. Today, it has become a business, but at its heart it remains a way to help my community and keep our heritage alive.
ourStory.thankYou: When I say 'Thank you,' I mean siyabonga — gratitude from the heart.
ourStory.livingKraalP: Mzamo Village Homestead is not a museum — it is a living, breathing Zulu kraal. Here, traditions are not displayed behind glass but shared through experience. From beadwork and dance to storytelling around the fire, every moment is an invitation into authentic isiZulu life.
ourStory.missionP: We aim to preserve and celebrate Zulu heritage by opening our homestead to visitors from around the world. Our mission is to foster unity, joy, and understanding through cultural exchange.
ourStory.communityP: Every experience at Mzamo Village is led by community members — elders, warriors, and artisans — ensuring that the heritage is passed down authentically and respectfully.

tour.title: The isiZulu Cultural Tour
tour.desc: One unified journey into authentic Zulu life — four hands-on activities woven into a single, immersive cultural experience at Mzamo Village.

workshops.title: School Workshops
workshops.desc: Interactive cultural education for school groups and learners.

homesteadStay.title: Homestead Stay
homesteadStay.desc: Spend time living alongside the village as part of daily homestead life.

hutStay.title: isiZulu Traditional Hut Stay
hutStay.desc: Sleep overnight in an authentic traditional Zulu hut.

ceremonies.title: Traditional Ceremonies
ceremonies.desc: Take part in genuine Zulu cultural ceremonies and rituals.

craftsmanship.title: Handmade by Our Community
craftsmanship.desc: Every curio, bead, and carving in our shop is made by hand by Mzamo and the residents of Mzamo Village — authentic craftsmanship that supports our community directly.

beadwork.title: Beadwork with Gogo
beadwork.desc: Learn traditional Zulu bead patterns and create your own bracelet.

dance.title: Zulu Dance & Music
dance.desc: Join the warriors for energetic traditional dancing.

spear.title: Spear & Shield Crafting
spear.desc: Discover warrior arts and symbols of strength.

cooking.title: Traditional Cooking
cooking.desc: Cook authentic Zulu recipes over an open fire with our community.

accommodation.title: Hut Accommodation
accommodation.desc: Sleep in a traditional isiZulu hut and wake to village sounds.
